name: Create ML training pod with Jupyter
description: User wants a GPU pod for ML training with persistent storage and Jupyter access.
user_intent: I need a GPU pod for ML training. Use an RTX 4090 with the runpod/pytorch:2.1.0 image. I want 100GB persistent storage mounted at /workspace, expose port 8888 for Jupyter. Name it rpcli-eval-train. After creating, verify the pod exists by getting its details.
expected_outcome: Agent creates a pod with the correct GPU, image, volume size, volume path, and exposed ports. The pod is verified to exist.
